details.test: Task 1: Create alumni profile with interests and email-only communication
Task 2: RSVP to earliest free networking event in NYC next month
Task 3: One-time $75 donation to Scholarship Fund with email newsletter only
Task 4: Find Seattle software alum (2010-2015) and send connection message
Task 5: Join Dallas alumni chapter and select Events Committee only
Task 6: Sign up as CS mentor for undergrads with 3 hours of evenings per month
Task 7: Save two remote entry-level marketing jobs posted last 7 days with salary >= 50000
Task 8: Add navy hoodies under $40 (size M) to cart and start checkout
Task 9: Post class note about promotion (Class of 2015, Boston, MA)
Task 10: Sign up for Homecoming Weekend volunteer shift in October (>=3 hours)
